While I try to avoid last-minute work, I sometimes find myself in situations where I have to push through and finish things quickly. However, based on my personality and values, I lean more toward completing tasks early when possible to reduce stress and ensure quality. That said, I also understand the pressure of deadlines and the need to adapt when things don't go as planned.
